title: Anatomy
description: Structural breakdown with labeled parts, dimension specs, interactive states, and parts reference table

sections.parts: Letter-labeled callouts (A, B, C...) for every visible sub-element of the component. Include container, text elements, icons, dividers, badges — anything a developer would need to know about. figmaLayerName must match the actual Figma layer name for badge positioning.
sections.specs: Measurement annotations for all fixed dimensions: height, width, padding, gaps, border-radius, icon sizes. Use orientation 'vertical' for heights/vertical gaps, 'horizontal' for widths/horizontal gaps.
sections.states: All interactive states the component supports. Always include Default. Common states: Hovered, Focused, Active, Pressed, Error, Disabled, Read-only, Loading, Selected.
sections.partsTable: One row per anatomy part with: part letter, element name, relevant tokens (spacing, typography, radius), and notes (actual pixel values, font specs).

qualityRules: Every visible sub-element must have a parts entry — don't skip container, decorative elements, or nested components
figmaLayerName must match actual Figma layer names — verify against component metadata
specs must cover ALL fixed dimensions — height, horizontal padding, vertical gaps, border-radius at minimum
states must include Default plus every interactive state the component has — check the variant axes
partsTable rows must use --zen-* token names, never raw pixel values in the token column
Letters must be sequential (A, B, C...) with no gaps
